title: Syrian-Style Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from the streets of Syria, featuring tender lamb kebabs marinated in a blend of spices and grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Syrian-style spice blend (sumac, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, allspice)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoky BBQ sauce, Syrian-style spice blend, garlic, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the kebabs to a serving platter and brush with lemon juice.
Serve the kebabs hot with pita bread and your favorite sides.
Garnish with additional parsley and serve immediately.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
